name: Yieh Phui Enterprise Co., Ltd.
summary: Yieh Phui Enterprise Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, processes, manufactures, markets, imports and exports, and trades in steel products in Taiwan. It provides pickled steel coils, cold-rolled steel coils, galvanized steel coils, coated steel coils, and steel coil products; buildings, plants, and bridges steel structures; frame cranes; straddle carrier; container crane; steel pipes; aluminum-zinc plated steel coils; mechanical parts; stainless and carbon steel wires; alloy and free-cutting steel wires; steel and straight bars; and RFID products, walkie-talkies, and smart monitoring system for LED street lights, as well as OEM/ODM and piping engineering design services. The company also designs, manufactures, and installs EOT cranes, gantry cranes, and rail mounted gantry container cranes; offers black steel, pre-galvanized steel, EMT steel, square/rectangular steel, structural steel, rigid steel conduit, steel sprinkler, and oval steel pipes, as well as API casing and line pipes; develops, leases, and sells residential and commercial buildings, and department stores; manufactures and markets military specification printed circuit boards, and special high grade alloys; wholesales hardware, telecommunications equipment, and daily necessities; technical consultation for steel products; management services; manufactures metal; and mines for nickel, as well as operates hotels and radio. It exports its products to Mainland China, Southeast Asia, Europe, North America, Central and South America, Japan, the Middle East, Africa, and Australia. The company was formerly known as Kuo Chiao Enterprise Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yieh Phui Enterprise Co., Ltd. in March 1986. Yieh Phui Enterprise Co., Ltd. was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.
